title: Recent versions of YoSys generate much larger designs
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Example IL to demonstrate this issue: https://gist.github.com/WRansohoff/95ad66005847f9ce3b88110655f86fda

Synthesize the above RTLIL for an iCE40 UltraPlus with the most recent commit (currently 93ef516), and observe the following report statistics:

```
=== top ===

   Number of wires:               7186
   Number of wire bits:          14818
   Number of public wires:        7186
   Number of public wire bits:   14818
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:              10710
     SB_CARRY                      547
     SB_DFF                         44
     SB_DFFE                        69
     SB_DFFESR                    2932
     SB_DFFSR                       64
     SB_HFOSC                        1
     SB_IO                           7
     SB_LUT4                      7044
     SB_RAM40_4K                     2
```

Synthesize it with an older commit (ed4fa19b), and observe the following output:

```
=== top ===

   Number of wires:               3930
   Number of wire bits:           9609
   Number of public wires:        3930
   Number of public wire bits:    9609
   Number of memories:               0
   Number of memory bits:            0
   Number of processes:              0
   Number of cells:               5438
     SB_CARRY                      547
     SB_DFF                         32
     SB_DFFE                        69
     SB_DFFESR                     884
     SB_DFFSR                       98
     SB_HFOSC                        1
     SB_IO                           7
     SB_LUT4                      3794
     SB_RAM40_4K                     6
```

Sorry that I don't know enough to trim down the RTLIL which demonstrates this issue. From discussion on IRC, it sounds like there might be some areas of the design which are no longer being mapped to RAM blocks?

## Expected behavior

Ideally, updating the toolchain would not cause the generated designs to be larger by almost a factor of 2.

## Actual behavior

The synthesized design is much larger than expected after updating.

Thanks for taking a look!
